    A

    Action - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board
    Represents the actions available to a player on a given offer tile: how many cards they may draw from the top list and how many from the bottom list.

    Creates a new changed era exception instance.
    checkpoints() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Player.Player
    Computes the end-game prestige points earned from tribe cards: artists (every 2 = 10 PP), builders (fixed PP per card), and inventors (count × number of distinct inventor icons).
    checkWinner() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game

    Creates a new game lobby with the given host player.

    Sends a request to create a new game.
    createGame(PlayerDTO, int, ClientRemoteInterface) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI.ServerNetworkHandler
    Creates a new Mesos game lobby hosted by the given player.

    Creates a message requesting that a new game be created.
    createMemento() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board.Board
    Creates a memento capturing the current order of players on default tiles.
    createMemento() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game
    Creates a memento capturing the entire current game state: era, game phase, number of players, the current placing player, the current action player, every player's state, the market state, and the board state.
    createMemento() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Market
    Creates a memento capturing the current market state: top and bottom rows of cards and buildings, the remaining deck, and the pool of buildings not yet visible.
    createMemento() - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.persistance.MementoManager
    Creates a memento capturing the current state of this object.
    createMemento() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Player.Player
    Creates a memento capturing the current player state: nickname, totem colour, food amount, prestige points, tribe serialised as DTOs, and owned building IDs.

    Cross-registers every provided ServerVirtualView as a PlayerObserver on every player.

    Returns the value of the currentEra record component.

    E

    EmptyMarketException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception
    Thrown when a player attempts to draw from a market row that contains no selectable cards (the row is either empty or contains only event cards).
    EmptyMarketException() - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.EmptyMarketException
    Creates a new empty market exception with no message.
    EmptyMarketException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.EmptyMarketException
    Creates a new empty market exception instance.
    END_GAME - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.EVENT_TYPE
    End-of-game event — resolved when the final round concludes.
    END_GAME - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.GAME_PHASE
    The game is over and winners are being calculated.
    END_ROUND - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.EVENT_TYPE
    End-of-round event — resolved automatically at the close of each round.
    EndGameController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI
    JavaFX controller for the end-game screen.
    EndGameController() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.EndGameController
    Default constructor used by the JavaFX FXML loader.
    EndGameController.PlayerRankEntry - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI
    Immutable row model for the end-game ranking table.
    EndGameException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception
    Thrown when the last round's resolve-action phase is complete, signalling that the game is over and winners should be calculated.
    EndGameException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.EndGameException
    Creates a new end game exception instance.
    endGameIter() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game
    applies the building effect if any of the players has at least one in their tribe solves the final events and the other events if there are any other manages the prestige points by checking the tribe each of the players have
    EndGameTUI - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI
    TUI component that renders the end-game screen.
    EndGameTUI(ClientVirtualView, TUIUtils, Scanner, PlayerDTO, ServerRemoteInterface) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI.EndGameTUI
    Creates the end-game TUI screen.
    EndOfPlacingPhaseException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception
    Thrown when all players have placed their totems on offer tiles, signalling that the placing phase is complete and the game should transition to the resolve-action phase.
    EndOfPlacingPhaseException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.EndOfPlacingPhaseException
    Creates a new end of placing phase exception instance.
    EndOfPlayingPhaseException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception
    Thrown when all players have resolved their offer-tile actions, signalling that the playing phase is complete and the game should transition to the next round.
    EndOfPlayingPhaseException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.EndOfPlayingPhaseException
    Creates a new end of playing phase exception instance.
    endOfRoundMarketActions() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Market
    this method does all the things that has to be done at the end of the round in the market area: 1)if there are solves the events in the bottom list 2)clear the bottom list 3)shift the remaining card from the top list to the bottom list 4) refill the top list 5)Try refilling the topCardList 5.a) if an ERA change is detected it: 5.1) clears the bottomBuildingList 5.2)shift the building from the top to bottom building list 5.3) refill the topBuildingList 5.b) if the deck is finished throws DeckFineshed7

    era - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.Card
    The era in which this card was introduced.
    ERA - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums
    The three eras through which a Mesos game progresses.
    ERA_I - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.ERA
    First era — early-game cards and events.
    ERA_II - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.ERA
    Second era — mid-game cards and events.
    ERA_III - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.ERA
    Third and final era — late-game cards and events.

    Executes era changed.

    Notifies the client that the game has advanced to a new era.

    Notifies the client that the era has changed.

    F

    finished(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI.EndGameTUI
    Displays the end-game screen with the list of winners and the global leaderboard.
    FIVE_PLAYER_BOTTOM_CARD - Static variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.UtilitiesConstant
    Number of cards in the bottom market row for a 5-player game.
    FIVE_PLAYER_TOP_CARD - Static variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.UtilitiesConstant
    Number of cards in the top market row for a 5-player game.
    FLUTE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.INV_ICON
    Flute icon.
    food() - Method in record class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.persistance.PlayerMemento
    Returns the value of the food record component.
    FOOD_OFFERTILE_A - Static variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.UtilitiesConstant
    Food granted to a player who places their totem on offer tile A (no card draws).
    FoodOnNewCoupleInventors - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building
    Building effect that awards 3 food for each new pair of Inventor cards sharing the same icon added to the tribe since the last time this effect was evaluated.
    FoodOnNewCoupleInventors() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Building.FoodOnNewCoupleInventors
    Constructs a building effect that rewards the player with food for each new pair of Inventors sharing the same icon.
    foodPerSlotPosition() - Method in record class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.DefaultTileDTO
    Returns the food reward per slot position for this default tile.
    forceAdvancePlacing() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game
    Advances the placing turn without an actual totem placement, used when the current placing player has disconnected.
    forceEndGame() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller.Controller
    Forces the game to end immediately, running end-game scoring and notifying all clients.
    forceInitialPlayersSync(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.ServerVirtualView
    Sends this client the full list of players in the lobby/game, also updating the local snapshot map.
    FOUR_PLAYER_BOTTOM_CARD - Static variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.UtilitiesConstant
    Number of cards in the bottom market row for a 4-player game.
    FOUR_PLAYER_TOP_CARD - Static variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.UtilitiesConstant
    Number of cards in the top market row for a 4-player game.

    G

    Game - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game
    Core game model for a Mesos session.
    Game(int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game
    constructor for loading game
    Game(Player, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game
    default constructor of game, this method when called creates the deck and the buildings by launching the factories.
    GAME_PHASE - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums
    Tracks the current phase of a Mesos game session.
    GameAlreadyLoadedException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception
    Thrown when attempting to load a new game while one is already active on the server.
    GameAlreadyLoadedException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.GameAlreadyLoadedException
    Constructs the exception indicating that a game has already been loaded.
    GameController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI
    Lightweight JavaFX game controller used during the main game loop.
    GameController(Stage, ServerRemoteInterface, ClientVirtualView, PlayerDTO) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.GameController
    Creates the game controller and registers this observer with the client view.
    GameDTO - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs
    Data-transfer object for the overall game state, carrying the current era, phase, and which players are next to place and play.
    GameDTO(ERA, GAME_PHASE, String, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.GameDTO
    Creates a GameDTO with the given state fields.
    GameFullException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception
    Thrown when a player tries to join a lobby that has already reached its maximum player count.
    GameFullException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.GameFullException
    Creates a new game full exception instance.
    GameMemento - Record Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.persistance
    Memento of the full game state at end of round.
    GameMemento(ERA, GAME_PHASE, int, String, String, List, MarketMemento, BoardMemento) - Constructor for record class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.persistance.GameMemento
    Creates an instance of a GameMemento record class.
    GameObserver - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Observers
    Observer interface for game-level state changes in Mesos.
    gamePhase() - Method in record class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.persistance.GameMemento
    Returns the value of the gamePhase record component.
    gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI.ClientVirtualView
    Executes game phase changed.
    gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI.ClientRemoteInterface
    Notifies the client that the game phase has changed.
    gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.ClientSocketProxy
    Notifies the client that the game phase has changed.
    GamePhaseChangedMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the game phase has changed.
    GamePhaseChangedMessage(GAME_PHASE) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages.GamePhaseChangedMessage
    Creates a message carrying the new game phase.
    GameReadyToStartException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception
    Thrown when the last required player joins a lobby, signalling that the game is full and setupAndStartGame should be called immediately.
    GameReadyToStartException() - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.GameReadyToStartException
    Creates a new game ready to start exception instance.
    GameReadyToStartException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.GameReadyToStartException
    Creates a new game ready to start exception instance.
    gameStart() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game
    this method sets up the game after it is full: - it randomly place players on a default tile - it sets the game to the next phase, it notifies the player updating the views
    GameStartedException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception
    Thrown when a client tries to create or join a lobby after the game has already started.
    GameStartedException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.Exception.GameStartedException
    Creates a new game started exception instance.
    gameStartLock - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI.ClientVirtualView
    Lock used to block the TUI until the game transitions from lobby to the first placing phase.
    GameView - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game
    Read-only view of the Game model exposed to observers and the board.
    gameWinners(List) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Observers.GameObserver
    Called when the game is over and the winners have been determined.
    gameWinners(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.ServerVirtualView
    Saves the list of winners in the local snapshot and notifies the client that the game is over.
    gameWinners(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI.ClientVirtualView
    Executes game winners.
    gameWinners(List) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI.ClientRemoteInterface
    Sends the list of winners when the game ends.
    gameWinners(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.ClientSocketProxy
    Sends the list of game winners to the client.
    GameWinnersMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages
    Server-to-client Socket message that delivers the final list of game winners.
    GameWinnersMessage(List) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages.GameWinnersMessage
    Creates a message carrying the list of game winners.

    joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI.ServerRemoteInterface
    Joins an already-loaded game session as a reconnecting player.
    joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.ServerSocketProxy
    Sends a request to join a game that is already being loaded.
    joinGameLoaded(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI.ServerNetworkHandler
    Allows a player to rejoin a game that is being loaded, after the first player has invoked ServerNetworkHandler.loadGame(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface).
    JoinGameLoadedMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages
    Socket message sent by a reconnecting player to join a game being loaded.
    JoinGameLoadedMessage(PlayerDTO) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages.JoinGameLoadedMessage
    Creates the socket message to join a game that is being loaded.

    L

    LAST_ROUND_PLACING_PHASE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.GAME_PHASE
    Same as GAME_PHASE.PLACING_PHASE but the deck is exhausted — this is the final round.
    LAST_ROUND_RESOLVE_ACTION - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.GAME_PHASE
    Same as GAME_PHASE.RESOLVE_ACTION but for the final round; ends the game.
    lastErrorMessage - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI.ClientVirtualView
    The last error message received from the server, or null if none.
    LEATHER - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.INV_ICON
    Leather icon.
    linkObserver(ServerVirtualView) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller.Controller
    Registers a ServerVirtualView as an observer of the game model, so the client associated with that view receives all game-event notifications (phase changes, market updates, board updates, etc.).
    linkObserver(ServerVirtualView) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game
    Registers a ServerVirtualView as an observer of the game, board, and market, so it receives all state-change notifications.
    load() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.persistance.PersistanceLogger
    Reads the save file from disk and deserialises the game memento.

    Rebuilds a list of buildings from their IDs during game restore.
    loadDeck(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Factory.Deck.DeckFactory
    Rebuilds a list of Cards from their DTO snapshots during game restore.
    loadGame(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller.Controller
    Loads a saved game from disk and restores the game state.
    loadGame(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI.ServerRemoteInterface
    Load a game if there is one
    loadGame(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.ServerSocketProxy
    Sends a request to load a saved game to the server.
    loadGame(PlayerDTO, ClientRemoteInterface) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI.ServerNetworkHandler
    Starts loading a saved game from disk.

    Socket message sent by the first reconnecting player to load a saved game.
    LoadGameMessage(PlayerDTO) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket.messages.LoadGameMessage

    Writes an error-level entry using the default ClientUtilitiesFunction.LOG_PREFIX.

    Logs an error message using the default utility prefix.

    Initializes the market by building the deck and buildings for the given player count, then populates both the bottom and top card/building rows.

    Observer interface for market-level state changes in Mesos.
    MarketTUI - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI

    MarketTUI(ServerRemoteInterface, ClientVirtualView, Scanner, TUIUtils, PlayerDTO) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI.MarketTUI
    Creates a new MarketTUI instance.
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.ArtistCard
    Checks whether this artist card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type and era.
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.BuilderCard
    Checks whether this builder card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type, era, and builder ID.
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.BuildingCard
    Building cards are never restored via DTO (they are recreated by the factory using their ID), so this method always returns false.
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.Card
    Returns true if this card matches the given DTO snapshot (used during game restore).
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.EventCard
    Checks whether this event card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type and event ID.
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.GathererCard
    Checks whether this gatherer card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type and era.
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.HuntersCard
    Checks whether this hunter card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type, era, and the icon flag.
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.InventorCard
    Checks whether this inventor card matches the given DTO by comparing card type, era, and invention icon.
    matchesDTO(CardDTO) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.ShamanCard
    Checks whether this shaman card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type, era, and star rating.
    MementoManager<T> - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.persistance
    Generic interface for classes that support the Memento pattern.
    MesosSplashScreen - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI
    Splash screen for the MESOS board game — IS26-AM25.
    MesosSplashScreen.StandaloneApp - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI
    Standalone JavaFX application used to test the splash screen animation in isolation, without launching the full Mesos client.
    MISSED_PONG_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.PongWatchdog
    Number of consecutive missed pongs before the server is declared dead.

    Maximum number of times a server-to-client notification is retried before the player is declared disconnected.

    Milliseconds to wait between consecutive retry attempts for a failed server-to-client notification, giving transient network issues time to resolve.

    Creates a new not enough food exception instance.

    Re-fires the full market and board state to all observers.

    Restores the game from the serialised state stored in the provided memento.

    Pushes the full game state (market, board, era, phase, current turn) to all registered observers.
    resyncClient() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.ServerVirtualView
    Sends all stored state snapshots to the reconnecting client so they can resume without missing any game state that was pushed while they were offline.
    returnOnDefaultTiles() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board.Board
    Moves all players from the offer tiles back to the default tiles and awards food according to the food-per-slot value of their assigned default tile.

    Continuously reads server-to-client messages from the socket stream and dispatches each to the ClientVirtualView.
    run() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.SocketClientHandler
    Reads messages from the client socket in a loop, dispatches them to the server logic, and forwards any game errors back to the client without closing the connection.

    SOCKET_TIMEOUT_MS - Static variable in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.Utilities.ClientUtilitiesFunction
    Socket read timeout in milliseconds; sockets are closed if the server is silent this long.

    solveEvent(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Event.ArtistEvent
    Applies the artist event: rewards qualifying players and penalises the rest, then triggers all PAINTINGS building effects.
    solveEvent(List) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Event.EventEffectInterface
    Applies this event's effect to all players.
    solveEvent(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Event.HuntEvent
    Applies the hunt event: gives food and Hunter-based PP to all players, then triggers all HUNT building effects.
    solveEvent(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Event.ShamanEvent
    Applies the shamanic ritual event: Triggers SHAMANIC_RIT building effects (first pass — snapshot phase). Finds the maximum and minimum Shaman-star totals among all players. Awards/deducts PP accordingly. Triggers SHAMANIC_RIT building effects again (second pass — resolution phase).
    solveEvent(List) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Effect.Event.SustenanceEvent
    Solves the sustenance event for all players: each tribe member costs foodPerCharacter food; gatherers discount 3 food each.
    solveEvents() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI.SolvingEventsTUI
    Handles the event-resolution phase on the terminal.

    Resolves the final events of the game.
    SOLVING_EVENTS - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Enums.GAME_PHASE
